name: 4imprint Group PLC
description: The largest direct marketer of promotional products in North America with ~5% of the $27bn US market. Zero-debt, drop-ship model with exceptional cash generation. Reports in USD, converted to GBP at ~1.27.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue $1,368m in FY2024 (~£1,077m). Largest player in fragmented $27bn US promo products market with ~5% share. Revenue per marketing dollar $7.88. 46% 24-month customer retention.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Operating margin 10.8% in FY2024 (up from 10.3%). Gross margin 31.8%. Low capex drop-ship model. Flexible marketing spend enables margin protection. Zero debt, $148m net cash.
assumptions.risks: US business confidence cyclicality, tariff risk on China-sourced products, new customer acquisition declined 10% in FY2024, single-market concentration (98% North America), GBP/USD translation risk.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued market share gains, Oshkosh distribution centre expansion (apparel growth), strong cash generation enabling regular + special dividends (490c total in FY2024). Huge runway in fragmented market.
